title: Enderman Death Silence
description: Enderman will stop their long scream when they die. Highlighy optimized mod that provides a minor satisfying improvement.
body:
You know how when you look at the endermen they start a loud annoying scream? And when you kill them, they just proceed to keep screaming and give you a headache? Yeah this mod is literally just to shut those guys up after they die.

**Upon death, any enderman stare scream sound effect just gets absolutely deleted.**

This mod is highly optimized and has zero performance cost, and it works even if you have it only on server-side! Yay!

# 

The mod's NeoForge version was not working for a long time, this was recently patched.
